strengths: Experience with ETL and data modeling
Quantified impact on reporting automation and efficiency
weaknesses: Limited explicit healthcare system tools (EPIC, Press Ganey)
No stated experience with control-chart/Six Sigma methodologies
improvement_bullets: Streamlined reporting workflows by leveraging PowerQuery and advanced Excel functions to automate data ingestion, reducing manual report preparation time by 40%.
Applied Lean and PDSA methodologies to optimize operational workflows, ensuring high-quality, standardized data output across all department reporting functions.
Utilized time-series and control-chart analysis techniques to monitor performance metrics, identifying key trends and variances that informed strategic decision-making.
Collaborated in an Agile environment to deliver cross-functional projects, managing documentation in JIRA and mentoring junior team members on data integrity and visualization standards.
Bridged technical and clinical teams by translating complex data requirements into actionable insights, utilizing SQL and Python to extract and prepare data for clinical quality reporting.
cover_letter: Dear Hiring Manager, I am excited to submit my application for the Application Analyst III opportunity with RWJBarnabas Health. I am interested in this opportunity because of the health system's commitment to delivering patient-centered, high-quality academic medicine and its focus on using data-driven insights to improve patient outcomes. What interests me about working for RWJBarnabas Health is its approach to social determinants of health and community-focused care, which inspires me because I am passionate about using analytics to drive tangible improvements in healthcare quality. I believe my advanced proficiency in SQL, Python, and Power BI and my experience in automating complex reporting workflows would make me a strong candidate for this role. During my professional career, I have approached problems by focusing on operational efficiency and data-backed decision-making. In fact, at Shine Masters, I identified that manual reporting was a significant bottleneck; I designed interactive Power BI dashboards and automated data pipelines using Zapier and SQL, which reduced reporting time by 40%. Ultimately, I know that the Application Analyst III role at RWJBarnabas Health would allow me to bring my data visualization and automation skills to the QIA department’s ongoing reporting initiatives. Additionally, my role as a Full-Stack Software Developer at Haven Technologies enabled me to develop my cross-functional collaboration skills. I collaborated with underwriting, product, and UI/UX teams to integrate complex data from multiple API and PostgreSQL sources, resulting in a 30% improvement in insurance testing data accuracy. I’m excited by the opportunity to use my ability to analyze large, multi-source datasets in working on clinical quality reporting at RWJBarnabas Health. I know that my technical background and my ability to mentor team members align with what it takes to succeed at the Application Analyst III role. I would love the opportunity to discuss the role in more detail. Thank you for your time and consideration. I look forward to hearing from you soon. Warm regards, Justin Miller
